name: Mira
text: Moon. The Lantern table is open, and you have been betting grief like it cannot run out.

name: Moon
text: I did not come to gamble. Move.

name: Mira
text: Everyone says that after they push all their chips into one impossible promise.

name: Mira
text: Then prove you can read the person across from you, not only the hand you want.

name: Moon
text: Deal, Mira. I will not fold.
